title: Platier Plates
description: A simple upgrade to all of Minecraft's Pressure Plates!
body:
# A simple resource pack that adds unique textures to all the pressure plates!

### It impacts:
- All wooden pressure plates (up to pale oak)
- The weighted pressure plates
- The Stone Pressure Plate
- The Polished Blackstone Pressure Plate

## Example photo:
![All the pressure plates side by side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d48ae8e790dd0923ff082cfab86da13f114adfc.png)
